PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT KUANG, ANTHONY JIA HONG DENG, MICHELLE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT LIU, DENNIS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT APPELLANT LIU, DENNIS RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT KUANG, ANTHONY JIA HONG $7,624.69 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,624.69, DENNIS LIU SHALL TAKE NOTHING AGAINST MICHELLE DENG. PHOTOGRAPHIC EVIDENCE SUPPORTS CLAIM OF LIU AGAINST KUANG. CROSS-CLAIM JUDGMENT IS ORDERED IN FAVOR OF DENNIS LIU AND AGAINST ANTHONY JIA HONG KUANG AND MICHELLE DENG IN THE AMOUNT OF $0.00. PHOTOGRAPHIC EVIDENCE SUPPORTS CLAIM OF LIU AGAINST CLAIMS OF KUANG AND DENG. THE JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL AND REPLACES THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT OF SEP-09-2013. calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Nov-14-2013 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 12:09PM
JUDGE PRO TEM JAMES FLEMING, CLERK WESLEY RAMIREZ, NOTHING ON RECORD. DEPT 525
CAUSE CALLED FOR SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL. APPELLANT, DENNIS LIU APPEARS IN PRO PER WITH HIS OWN INTERPRETER, BILLY HUANG. RESPONDENTS, ANTHONY JIA HONG KUANG AND MICHELLE DENG APPEAR THROUGH ATTORNEY, MELISSA GRANT (#283263). JUDGE CALLS RECESS AT 12:15PM TILL 1:15PM. HEARING RESUMES AFTER RECESS AT 1:20PM. PARTIES PREVIOUSLY SWORN, TESTIFY IN THE NARRATIVE AND RESPOND TO QUESTIONS FROM JUDGE FLEMING.

COUNSEL FOR RESPONDENT CALLS UPON THE COURT FOR A RULING THAT APPELLANT SHOULD NOT BE ALLOWED TO PROCEED IN HIS APPEAL TO HIS OWN CLAIM, AND NOT THE CLAIM AGAINST HIM. CCP 116.710(A) IS CITED BY COUNSEL. AFTER REVIEW OF CCP 116.770(D), JUDGE RULES AGAINST RESPONDENT, STATING THAT APPEAL MAY PROCEED. COUNSEL REQUESTS THAT RESPONDENT BE ALLOWED TO APPEAR BY TELEPHONE, JUDGE GRANTS REQUEST. COUNSEL FOR RESPONDENT CALLS CLIENT ON HER OWN PHONE FOR HEARING AT 1:50PM. RESPONDENT CANNOT BE CONTACTED BY PHONE DUE TO BAD CONNECTION. MATTER PROCEEDS WITHOUT RESPONDENT AND JUDGE ASKS COUNSEL TO OFFER DETAILS OF HER CLIENTS TESTIMONY.

EXHA (1) SIX PHOTOS OF DAMAGES/DIAGRAM
EXHA (2) ESTIMATE OF DAMAGES
EXHA (3) SCHOOL CALENDAR FOR GYM ACTIVITIES

EXHR (A) ESTIMATE(S) OF DAMAGES AS TO BOTH VEHICLES

2:12PM
NEW EVIDENCE IS RETAINED. MATTER IS SUBMITTED.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Sep-09-2013 Judgment Entered

DEFENDANT'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Sep-09-2013 Judgment Entered
